title: Mutational Spectra of SARS-CoV-2 orf1ab Polyprotein and Signature Mutations in the USA
author: Shuvam Banerjee
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bgesjtee

steps.instruction: Retrieve the protein sequences through the NCBI Virus database. Specific input was "SARS-CoV-2"
Refine the output with a sequence length of 7100 from the initial 7050. The length of the target orf1ab polyprotein is 7096.
In total, 1307 sequences will be retrieved, among them 125 sequences were from Asia, 42 from Europe and 1134 solely from USA.
Eliminate all incomplete sequences or sequences with undermined residues (mentioned as X).

In total, 867 orf1ab polyprotein complete sequences deposited from 31 different states within the US were considered for the study (Group A). All the above-mentioned sequences from Asia (Group B) and Europe (Group C) were also selected.
Align multiple sequences of each of the above-mentioned groups using Clustal Omega .
Subdivide sequences in Group A into 31 subgroups depending on the regional source from which the sequence was originated.
MSA was conducted encompassing all subgroups using ancestral orf1ab polyprotein sequences of Wuhan (YP_009742608, comprising of 7096 residues) as reference sequence.
Set gap opening penalty and gap extension penalty at 12 and 2, respectively, to ensure that unnecessary gaps are not created during alignment and alterations are visualised easily.
Thoroughly screen alignment results to determine the exact locaitons of the mutations and alteration linked to that position.
Calculate the number of occurance of each mutated variant in Group A, B, and C.
Divide by the total number of sequence submitted under that group. The proportion of each variant in Group A would be a/x and likewise for the other groups.

Caluclate the p-value through Z-score using the proportion of the mutant and sample size to establish whether the occurance of that mutant variant in USA (Group A) is significantly higher in comparison to Asia and Europe (Group B and C). Two-tailed p values were calculated using 0.05 as the significance level. Thus attempt has been made to identify the signature mutations in the region of orf1ab polyprotein.
Report structures of the associated non-structural proteins for wild type at I-Tasser server. The structures were not available for the varied amino acid alteration.
To identify the alteration, generate secondary structure by using the Homology Modelling method by I-Tasser .
Superimpose the alteration with the wild type using UCSF Chimera and PyMOL for easy visualization and comparison.
